title: Cribl Pipeline
description: A Cribl processing pipeline that defines an ordered sequence of functions for transforming, filtering, and enriching observability data events in real time.

conf.description: Pipeline configuration containing functions and settings

functions.description: Ordered list of processing functions that events pass through sequentially

description.description: A human-readable description of the pipeline purpose

asyncFuncTimeout.description: Timeout for asynchronous functions in milliseconds

output.description: Default output destination for processed events

streamtags.description: Tags applied to all events processed by this pipeline

groups.description: Worker group or fleet-specific configuration overrides

PipelineFunction.description: A processing function within a pipeline that performs a specific data transformation operation.

id.description: The function type identifier such as eval, regex_extract, rename, mask, aggregate, or serialize

filter.description: JavaScript expression that determines which events this function processes. Returns true to process, false to skip.

disabled.description: Whether this function is disabled and should be skipped during processing

conf.description: Function-specific configuration parameters that vary by function type

description.description: A human-readable description of what this function does

final.description: Whether to stop processing subsequent functions after this one

groupId.description: Group identifier for visually grouping functions in the UI
